{{< include day02-penguins-setup.qmd >}}

{{< include day02-tidymodels-walkthrough.qmd >}}

*Canonical pipeline: edit [`day02-tidymodels-walkthrough.qmd`](https://github.com/s-peischl/ML_SS_2026/blob/main/_includes/day02-tidymodels-walkthrough.qmd) and [`day02-penguins-setup.qmd`](https://github.com/s-peischl/ML_SS_2026/blob/main/_includes/day02-penguins-setup.qmd). When including from `modules/`, use the two paths under `../_includes/` directly (see Module 04).*
